query:
UPDATE subcategories s 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id 
SET s.hasBobaOption = 0, s.hasSizeVariants = 0
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Sweet%' OR c.name LIKE '%Bites%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute UPDATE subcategories s 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id 
SET s.hasBobaOption = 0, s.hasSizeVariants = 0
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Sweet%' OR c.name LIKE '%Bites%';
